title: Pre-stain Protocol for GreenGlo™ Safe DNA Dye
author: Denville Scientific
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gp6bvre

steps.instruction: Add GreenGlo ™ to melted agarose when the agarose has cooled to 50 to 60ºC. If post-staining, follow the Post-stain protocol for GreenGlo™ Safe DNA Dye .
Use 4-6 µl per 100 ml of agarose or 2-3 µl per 50 ml of agarose IMPORTANT : GreenGlo ™ is supplied in 20,000X concentration in water
Detect bands under UV illumination (yellow or green gelatin- or cellophane filters is recommended for clearer bands) or non-UV LED illuminators such as Blue Light LED illumination.
